title: CompiledScript missing Clone
description: CompiledScript (lib.rs) wraps two Arc fields (Arc<Script> and Arc<HashMap<...>>). Clone on CompiledScript would be O(1) — just incrementing two reference counts — and is the expected interface for a type intended to be shared across threads (it already asserts Send+Sync). Without Clone, callers who want to evaluate the same compiled script from multiple threads must wrap it in Arc themselves. Deriving or manually implementing Clone is a straightforward addition to the public API.
